description: Clan overlay for SXLB skill taxonomy. Clan is for human navigation and recall context; execution authority remains family/department-bound.

clans.title: 治理与工作法
clans.use_when: 处理 agent 自身的治理、流程、skill 管理、复核方法和 SXLB 案卷。
clans.boundary: Clan is an agent-readable recall context layer; it does not grant execution authority.

clans.title: Vault 与知识库
clans.use_when: 处理 Markdown vault、Daily/Weekly、内部 wiki、GPT 记录和 vault 写回。
clans.boundary: Clan is an agent-readable recall context layer; it does not grant execution authority.

clans.title: 沟通与邮件
clans.use_when: 处理人物沟通证据库、邮件线程、Outlook 邮箱和沟通行动项。
clans.boundary: Clan is an agent-readable recall context layer; it does not grant execution authority.

clans.title: 学习与研究
clans.use_when: 处理 TOEFL、阅读研究、Zotero、NotebookLM 和文献证据。
clans.boundary: Clan is an agent-readable recall context layer; it does not grant execution authority.

clans.title: 文档与数据
clans.use_when: 处理 PDF、Word、PPT、表格、CSV、导出和正式文档产物。
clans.boundary: Clan is an agent-readable recall context layer; it does not grant execution authority.

clans.title: 浏览器、自动化与开发协作
clans.use_when: 处理浏览器验证、Chrome、Computer Use、文件整理、Spark、GitHub 和自动化集成。
clans.boundary: Clan is an agent-readable recall context layer; it does not grant execution authority.

clans.title: 设计与创作
clans.use_when: 处理前端界面、产品设计、Figma、Canva、图像生成、文案润色和创意生产。
clans.boundary: Clan is an agent-readable recall context layer; it does not grant execution authority.

clans.title: 安全
clans.use_when: 处理安全扫描、威胁建模、攻击路径、漏洞修复和安全复核。
clans.boundary: Clan is an agent-readable recall context layer; it does not grant execution authority.
